text.title: github-repo-bootstrap Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for github-repo-bootstrap as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Enabling all three merge styles (merge commit + squash + rebase) at once and leaving "delete branch on merge" off.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Mixed merge styles produce non-linear history that breaks `git bisect`, confuses release-note tooling that walks first-parent, and makes squash-based PR titles inconsistent with the actual commits on main. Stale branches accumulate and slow down `gh pr list` and IDE branch pickers. Pick squash-only with linear history; let CI tooling and `git log --oneline` rely on a clean line of commits.
